items.title: Introduction
items.description: Servercn is a component-based backend development system for Node.js and TypeScript.

items.title: Servercn CLI
items.description: The Servercn CLI provides a set of commands to help you manage your Servercn projects.

items.title: Installation
items.description: Learn how to install and set up Servercn in your project.

items.title: JavaScript Guide
items.description: JavaScript guide for developers who are comfortable with JavaScript and want to use Servercn components without diving into TypeScrip

items.title: Component
items.description: Contribute reusable backend components for Node.js projects. Learn about component structure, testing, and submission guidelines.

items.title: Blueprint
items.description: Create and share complete project blueprints. Understand blueprint architecture and how to design scalable application templates.

items.title: Foundation
items.description: Build foundational elements like authentication, database connections, and core utilities. Contribute to the base layers of Servercn.

items.title: Schema
items.description: Define and contribute data schemas for consistent API structures. Learn about schema validation and documentation standards.

items.title: JWT Utilities
items.description: JWT Utilities for JSON Web Token authentication with access & refresh token support for Express

items.title: Global Error Handler
items.description: Centralized error handling for Express applications using TypeScript.

items.title: API Error Handler
items.description: A lightweight, production-ready error handling utility for Express applications.

items.title: API Response Formatter
items.description: A standardized, type-safe API response wrapper for Express applications.

items.title: Async Request Handler
items.description: The Async Handler component is a foundational Express utility that ensures all errors thrown inside asynchronous route handlers are reliably captured and forwarded to Express's global error middleware.

items.title: Password Hashing
items.description: The Password Hashing component provides a standardized way to hash passwords in Servercn using bcryptjs, argon2, pbkdf2, scrypt.

items.title: HTTP Status Codes
items.description: Centralized, type-safe HTTP status codes for consistent API responses.

items.title: Auth Verification Middleware
items.description: Auth Verification Middleware protects private routes by validating user authentication using JWT access tokens and refresh tokens.

items.title: Structured Logger
items.description: Structured and configurable logging for Node.js applications using Winston or Pino.

items.title: File Upload (Cloudinary)
items.description: The File Upload component provides a standardized way to handle file uploads in Servercn using Cloudinary as the storage provider.

items.title: File Upload (ImageKit)
items.description: The File Upload component provides a standardized way to handle file uploads in Servercn using ImageKit as the storage provider.

items.title: Email Service
items.description: The Send Email component provides a standardized way to send emails in Servercn using nodemailer as the email service provider.

items.title: Not Found Handler
items.description: The Not Found Handler component provides a standardized way to handle not found routes in Servercn.

items.title: Request Validator (Zod)
items.description: The Request Validator (Zod) middleware provides a type-safe and declarative way to validate incoming HTTP requests in Servercn using Zod.

items.title: Health Check Endpoint
items.description: Production-ready health check endpoints for monitoring API status, database connectivity, and system health in Express applications.

items.title: Google OAuth
items.description: The Google OAuth component provides a standardized way to handle Google OAuth authentication in Servercn.

items.title: Graceful Shutdown Handler
items.description: The Graceful Shutdown Handler ensures that your Servercn application terminates safely and predictably when the process receives shutdown signals (e.g. SIGTERM, SIGINT).

items.title: Role Based Access Control
items.description: The Role Based Access Control component provides a standardized way to handle role based access control in Servercn.

items.title: Rate Limiter
items.description: The Rate Limiter component provides a standardized way to handle rate limiting in Servercn.

items.title: GitHub & Google OAuth
items.description: The GitHub & Google OAuth component provides a standardized way to handle GitHub & Google OAuth authentication in Servercn.

items.title: GitHub OAuth
items.description: The GitHub OAuth component provides a standardized way to handle GitHub OAuth authentication in Servercn.

items.title: Env Configuration
items.description: A type-safe environment variable configuration using Zod and Dotenv for Express applications.

items.title: Swagger API Documentation
items.description: Automated OpenAPI documentation and interactive UI for Express APIs using Swagger.

items.title: Security Headers
items.description: The Security Headers component provides a standardized way to handle security headers in Servercn.

items.title: Validate ObjectId Middleware
items.description: The Validate ObjectId Middleware component provides a standardized way to validate MongoDB ObjectIds in Servercn.

items.title: Token & OTP Utilities
items.description: Cryptographically secure utility functions for generating OTPs, random tokens, and unique identifiers for authentication workflows.

items.title: Background Jobs (Cron)
items.description: The Background Jobs component provides a standardized way to schedule recurring tasks and background jobs in Servercn using node-cron.

items.title: Basic Express Starter
items.description: A robust Express.js server foundation with TypeScript, error handling, and structured logging.

items.title: Mongoose Starter
items.description: A production-ready MongoDB foundation with Mongoose, featuring schema validation and type safety.

items.title: Drizzle MySQL Starter
items.description: A production-ready MySQL foundation using Drizzle ORM for type-safe database interactions.

items.title: Drizzle PostgreSQL Starter
items.description: A production-ready PostgreSQL foundation using Drizzle ORM for type-safe database interactions.

items.title: Prisma MongoDB Starter
items.description: A production-ready MongoDB foundation using Prisma ORM for type-safe database interactions.

items.title: ESLint
items.description: A robust ESLint configuration for TypeScript and Express.js projects.

items.title: Prettier
items.description: A robust Prettier configuration for TypeScript and Express.js projects.

items.title: Husky
items.description: A robust Husky configuration for TypeScript and Express.js projects.

items.title: Lint-Staged
items.description: A robust Lint-Staged configuration for TypeScript and Express.js projects.

items.title: Commitlint
items.description: A robust Commitlint configuration for TypeScript and Express.js projects.

items.title: TypeScript
items.description: A robust TypeScript configuration for Node.js and Express.js projects.

items.title: Stateless Authentication
items.description: A stateless authentication blueprint with support for JWT access tokens and refresh tokens.

items.title: Stateful Authentication
items.description: Session-based authentication blueprint with secure login, logout, and server-managed session flow.

items.title: Hybrid Authentication
items.description: Hybrid authentication blueprint combining access/refresh token flows with secure session-aware patterns.

items.title: Banking Application
items.description: A simple banking application that integrates MongoDB through Mongoose for data management.

items.title: Authentication
items.description: Authentication domain schemas including User, OTP, and Session models with support for multiple databases.

items.title: Todo App
items.description: A production-ready Todo schema with support for MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.

items.title: Banking App
items.description: A production-ready Banking schema with support for MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.

items.title: Blog Application
items.description: A production-ready Blog schema with support for MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.
